title: Individual limitation

posts.author: OliverK (Oliver Kraus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
we would love to have the possibility to limit the answers. Especially for text and long text.
We request information from our customers via forms and this includes among other things, texts that are displayed in our trade fair program and elsewhere and for which we only have limited characters available.
Even if we have the character restriction in the description, many people overlook it.
Would be awesome and a big time saver.
